segments.text: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He makes me lie down in green pastures. He leads me beside still waters.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: green pastures: Heb. pastures of tender grass
still waters: Heb. waters of quietness

segments.text: He restores my soul. He leads me in paths of righteousness for his name's sake.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for you are with me; your rod and your staff, they comfort me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies; you anoint my head with oil; my cup overflows.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life, and I shall dwell in the house of the LORD forever.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: for ever: Heb. to length of days
